stemHtml:
Calculate the allowed mass for take-off, given the following data for a Medium-Range Jet Transport Aeroplane(MRJT).

Maximum Zero Fuel Mass (MZFM): 61 688 kg
Maximum Take-Off Mass (MTOM): 66 990 kg
Maximum Landing Mass (MLM): 65 317 kg
Performance limited Take-Off Mass (TOM): 64 900 kg
Performance limited Landing Mass (LM): 67 300 kg
Trip Fuel: 3800 kg
Block Fuel: 6000 kg
